methods.method_name: Statistical Analysis of Floral Resource Selection
methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the selection of floral resources by bees for honey and beebread production, using multivariate analyses and linear models.

steps.description: Tested the multivariate homogeneity of the dispersion of groups between honey and beebread using PERMDISP.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PERMDISP analysis using betadisper function from vegan package

steps.description: Quantified the difference in plant genus composition between beebread and honey using PERMANOVA.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PERMANOVA using adonis2 function from vegan package

steps.description: Applied nonmetric multidimensional scaling (NMDS) to describe how honey and beebread samples differ and group into distinct clusters.
steps.searchable_summary: perform NMDS using metaMDS function from vegan package

steps.description: Analyzed the number of genera in each sample type with linear models using time point as explanatory variable and hive as random variable.
steps.searchable_summary: perform linear modeling using lmer function from lme4 package

steps.description: Performed pairwise comparisons for time points using emmeans-package with Tukey p-value adjustment.
steps.searchable_summary: perform pairwise comparisons using emmeans package

steps.description: Analyzed the proportion of shared and non-shared genera within the paired honey-beebread comparisons using a binomial generalized linear model.
steps.searchable_summary: perform binomial GLM using glmer function from lme4 package

steps.description: Identified plant genera most associated with honey and beebread samples using Indicator Species Analysis (IndVal).
steps.searchable_summary: perform IndVal analysis using multipatt function from indicspecies package

steps.description: Tested the contribution of variables affecting floral choices using partial redundancy analysis (RDA).
steps.searchable_summary: perform RDA using vegan package

steps.description: Quantified variation associated with temporal, spatial, and methodological variables using variation partitioning.
steps.searchable_summary: perform variation partitioning using varpart function from vegan package

methods.description: Procedures for purifying specialized metabolites from honey samples using two different purification methods to recover a wide variety of metabolites.

steps.description: Measured five grams of honey into 50 ml centrifuge tubes in three replicates.
steps.searchable_summary: weigh and distribute honey samples into centrifuge tubes

steps.description: Mixed honey with water adjusted to pH 2 with HCl and stirred with magnetic stirrer.
steps.searchable_summary: mix honey with acidic water and stir

steps.description: Centrifuged samples to remove particles.
steps.searchable_summary: centrifuge honey mixture to remove particles

steps.description: Loaded supernatant on an Oasis HLB cartridge, preconditioned with methanol and water.
steps.searchable_summary: load supernatant on preconditioned HLB cartridge

steps.description: Eluted analytes with methanol and removed eluent under nitrogen stream.
steps.searchable_summary: elute analytes with methanol and evaporate under nitrogen

steps.description: Reconstituted samples in formic acid/acetonitrile solution with internal standard and filtered.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstitute and filter samples with internal standard

steps.description: Purified samples with QuEChERS protocol for alkaloids and very polar compounds.
steps.searchable_summary: apply QuEChERS protocol for purification

methods.description: Procedures for studying the foraging choices of honeybees and collecting samples from hives and surrounding flowering plants.

steps.description: Mapped the flowering plants and collected beebread and honey samples at three time points during the summer 2021.
steps.searchable_summary: map flowering plants and collect beebread and honey samples

steps.description: Assessed flowering plants within 3 km distance of the hives using stratified sampling.
steps.searchable_summary: assess flowering plants using stratified sampling

steps.description: Collected honey samples by pooling from three frames in each hive.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and pool honey samples from hive frames

steps.description: Collected beebread samples by sampling from cells in three frames.
steps.searchable_summary: collect beebread samples from hive cells

steps.description: Stored samples frozen at −20 °C before further processing.
steps.searchable_summary: store samples at −20 °C
